scroll_found.title: Research the On The Blade scroll at a Research Pedestal

kill_100.title: Kill 100 hostile mobs with a melee weapon — build your combat foundation

subtitle.text: The weapon is just the ending. Everything before the swing is the craft.

description: CH.03 · ON THE BLADE
▸ This is a lore scroll.
Not a crafting guide. Not a stat sheet.
It was written by someone who lived long enough
to write it down.
◈ COMBAT PHILOSOPHY
└ The sword does not decide. You decide.
The sword just executes the decision faster.
└ Speed vs Power: most of this world rewards speed
You cannot outswing a Warden. You can outrun it.
└ Range: spears and halberds keep you alive
longer than daggers in boss fights
└ Crowd Control: knockback weapons vs fast mobs
Scythe sweep clears rooms. Use it.
◈ PRACTICAL NOTES FROM THE SCROLL
└ Always enchant before a boss — unenchanted weapons
on Cataclysm bosses is a death sentence
└ Food buffs are not optional in Ch11+
└ Shields block more than you think they do
└ The Forgotten Knight who wrote this died fighting
something larger than what you've seen yet.
Be ready.
◈ SCROLL: On The Blade
└ Found in: warrior graves, dojo ruins,
honored dead tombs, battle camp remnants
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: combat philosophy awareness,
boss-readiness mental framework
▸ They found the scroll beside the body.
The body had won.
The scroll explains how.
▶ Find The On The Blade scroll [check]
▶ Kill 100 hostile mobs with melee [check]
◇ Peak Stamina and Pressure (Ch03 already covers)
affect how long you can maintain combat.
Don't forget them when prepping for Ch11.
